details.test: Task 1: Save three recent beginner Wi-Fi security articles to Reading List
Task 2: Bookmark search result with more comments into Practice Later
Task 3: Save article with most recommended tools to Research collection
Task 4: Comment on short, popular Wi-Fi article and copy its link
Task 5: Configure OSINT weekly on-site and disable Malware notifications
Task 6: Add filtered article to Weekend Practice and mark In progress
Task 7: Open first parts of Web App Penetration Testing series
Task 8: Rate top Beginner article 4 stars and submit feedback
